description: Arriving at Strucker’s Lisbon penthouse, May and Bobbi find Kebo and the other Hydra operatives attacking Strucker. May interrogates Strucker for Ward’s location while Bobbi battles Kebo, ultimately defeating him in a physically brutal fight. May gets shocking information from a dying Strucker: Andrew Garner transformed into a monster when confronted—implying he is Lash. This is the episode's action and revelation peak.

transcript.line: Strucker. Strucker. Where do I find Ward?
I've taken down men three times your size, girl. What makes you think you can beat me?
I tried to do what Ward wanted. I tried to kill him.
We had him. But I didn't know he'd change into that thing.
